vehicles.title: 2000 Alfa Romeo GTV
vehicles.subtitle: 2.0i LUSSO TWIN SPARK
vehicles.description:
2000 Alfa Romeo GTV Lusso - Full Main Dearler service history!
Are you looking for a classic sports car that combines style, performance, and Italian flair? Look no further! we’re offering this 2000 Alfa Romeo GTV Lusso, which has only 125,000 miles on the clock
Key features
- Powerful and responsive 2.0 Twin spark engine
- Smooth 5 speed manual transmission
- Luxurious Italian leather interior with ample comfort
- Recent tax and long NCT certificate, ensuring peace of mind for the new owner
This GTV has been well-maintained and drives like a dream. Whether you're a collector or just looking for an exhilarating drive, this Alfa Romeo won't disappoint.
Don’t miss out on this fantastic opportunity to own a piece of automotive art! Contact us for more details or to schedule a viewing.

vehicles.title: 1989 Porsche 944
vehicles.subtitle: * Now Reserved *
vehicles.description:
Now Reserved Rare opportunity to buy a classic Porsche 944 S2 finished in iconic Guards Red. 3.0L engine, manual gearbox, pop-up headlights, and drives superbly.
Comes with a comprehensive service history and extensive maintenance records. A very well cared-for car that's becoming increasingly collectible and hard to find in this condition. Showroom Kept.
Built with Porsche's renowned transaxle design, the 944 S2 offers near-perfect weight distribution and exceptional road handling, making it one of the best- driving classics of its era.
Just NCT'D and Taxed viewing Strictly by Appointment Only . No Trade Ins .
A real driver's car with timeless styling and strong investment potential.
